scripts.prepack: npm run build && node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; fs.rmSync('templates', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.cpSync('../templates', 'templates', { recursive: true })"
scripts.postpack: node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; fs.rmSync('templates', { recursive: true, force: true })"
